name: Grasshopper Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions: Combine marshmallows and milk in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cook until marshmallows melt, stirring frequently. Remove from heat and cool slightly. Add creme de menthe and creme de cacao; fold in whipped cream. Spread ice cream evenly in piecrust, and pour marshmallow mixture over ice cream. Freeze at least 6 hours. Garnish with additional whipped cream.
